snippet.title: BABYMONSTER - 'I LIKE IT' M/V
snippet.description:
I LIKE IT 

Hey, boy
넌 뭔데
머릿속이 복잡해
내가 고장 나 버린 듯
Mayday
너 땜에
정신 나간 거 같애
I think I’m falling in love with you

어떡해 나
미쳤나 봐
틈만 나면 네 생각을 해
자꾸 혼자
웃음이 나
이런 내가 낯설기만 해

Tell me now
너도 원하잖아
더 이상 망설이지 마
용기를 좀 내봐
어둠이 끝나가기 전에
One more chance

내 맘에 불을 질러줘
I don’t wanna let you go
내 귀에 매일 또 매일
보고 싶다 말을 해줘

Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo woo woo woo
Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo woo woo woo

It’s a kind of love
Got me thunderstruck
I can’t get enough of you ooh ah
Boy, you’re really like one in a milli
Never gon let it fizzle out
You got me all in my feelings
Our love is the realest
And that’s how we ride
Never alone, never wondering
Cause you forever my future

Tell me now
너도 원하잖아
더 이상 망설이지 마
용기를 좀 내봐
어둠이 끝나가기 전에
One more chance

내 맘에 불을 질러줘
I don’t wanna let you go
내 귀에 매일 또 매일
보고 싶다 말을 해줘

Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo woo woo woo
Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo
Woo woo woo woo woo woo

How you feel like that
My heart beats fast
And you love like that
기다려 온 순간
너와 함께라면 설레
And I can’t get enough
Cause the light won’t go down

I la-la-like it
I la-la-like it
I like it like it when I’m next to you
I la-la-like it
I la-la-like it
I like it like it when I’m next to you

Woo woo woo
I la-la-like it

I la-la-like it
Woo woo woo woo woo woo
I like it like it when I’m next to you (Crazy for you)

Woo woo woo
I la-la-like it
Hey, you know it’s true I’m crazy for you

snippet.title: 《功夫女足》2026 马来西亚官方预告 ｜ 即将献映 Kung Fu Soccer (2026) Malaysia Official Teaser | Coming Soon
snippet.description:
⚽🔥 功夫遇上足球，传奇正式回归！时隔25年，周星驰最新执导作品《功夫女足》首支预告震撼登场！👊✨

热血、爆笑、功夫、足球，当梦想再次开踢，每一脚都踢出不可能！准备好跟着周星驰，一起见证最疯狂、最热血的足球传奇了吗？🏃🏻‍➡️⚽

🎬《功夫女足》大荧幕即将上映，敬请期待！

⚽🔥 Kung Fu meets football. The legend returns! After 25 years, Stephen Chow is back with his latest directorial masterpiece, KUNG FU SOCCER! 👊✨

The first trailer is finally here—packed with action, laughter, heart, and the signature Stephen Chow magic fans have been waiting for. Dream big. Kick harder. Believe in the impossible. 🏃🏻‍➡️⚽

🎬 KUNG FU SOCCER — Coming Soon to Cinemas.

#KungFuSoccer #StephenChow #功夫女足 #EncoreFilms @stephenchow

snippet.title: DIOR大穎 - 她已不再是那個女孩 - (荒唐random MV)
snippet.description:
上天會用更好的安排
帶你穿過黑夜 走過陰霾 ✨


《她已不再是那個女孩》

作詞：DIOR 大穎
作曲：DIOR 大穎
演唱：DIOR 大穎

親愛的你啊
經歷過無數和自己的對話
明知道會受傷 還逞強 不害怕

我最愛的你啊
你落落大方的 接受變化
你走出世俗的框架
你不是 傻瓜

你帶著滿身泥沙
一個人離開了家
放下了多少牽掛
漸漸明白 這就是長大

她已不再是那個女孩
她不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
風起雨落 命運重新安排

她已不再是那個女孩
用真心交換 未知的未來
流過淚的眼 還是充滿期待
即便一路跌倒 滿身塵埃
放心 會好起來

當我回頭望 我走過好漫長的路
好多人陪著我 讓我覺得我好幸福

我帶著滿身泥沙
一個人離開了家
我偶爾還是會害怕
但我堅信前路 會開滿鮮花

她已不再是那個女孩
她不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
風起雨落 命運重新安排

我已不再是那個女孩
用真心交換 未知的未來
流過淚的眼 洗淨塵埃
雨過天晴之後
相信 會好起來

那一夜那個女孩 她再也不會回來
那一天那個女孩 她留在茫茫人海
那一年那個女孩 學會釋懷生命所有離開
她相信一切會有 更好的安排

她已不再是那個女孩
不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
經歷風雨過後 我才明白

上天會用更好的安排
帶你穿過黑夜 走過陰霾
雖然現在 我已不再是那個女孩
但我依舊 勇敢去愛
那個女孩她 還相信愛

漸漸明白 這就是長大

snippet.title: 《功夫女足》公佈演員名單預告片 周六內地上映力爭暑假首段票房
snippet.description:
《功夫女足》公佈演員名單預告片 周六內地上映力爭暑假首段票房

周星馳 自編自導嘅最新作品《功夫女足》，早前事先張揚將隨時突擊上映後，星期一正式宣布新片鐵定於7月11日公映，同時公佈嘅演出名單當中，亦可見包括主演包括 張小斐 迪麗熱巴 以及男星 張藝興，仲包括香港觀眾熟悉嘅 劉嘉玲 蔡思貝 張繼聰、歐陽靖 (MC Jin)，近年以楝篤笑聞名嘅 歐陽萬成 鄧月平 亦出現名單之中，另外日本男星 佐藤健 同 舞蹈組合 AVANTGARDEY 亦參與其中。

據指《功夫女足》講述「娥眉隊」女子足球隊，以傳統少林功夫融入現代足球，一路逆襲奪冠嘅故事。

除中港日明星陣容之外，據傳新片仲會出現韓國國寶級影帝 宋康昊 出演裁判，而前國家女足球主將 趙麗娜、李佳悅 亦會出演兼擔任技術指導，仲有傳聞指多位《少林足球》成員將客串驚喜現身。

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official Countdown Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: The Explosive Firecracker | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Jubilation Lee enters the battlefield with flying sparks. She's ready to ignite the battlefield with firework displays that are almost as explosive as her personality! ✨

Due to the effects of the Timestream Entanglement, Jubilee's son, Shogo, became trapped in his dragon form. Desperate to save him, Jubilee sought help from Apocalypse in Thebes, and in exchange, she became his Horseman of Famine. 

Ready to fight the world and be a shining beacon for her son, Jubilee generates bursts of pyrotechnic plasma as she shapes radiant energy into vibrant projectiles that shimmer with gleaming light. Combined with her vampiric powers, every firework she releases is an invigorating celebration on the battlefield! 

Spark up the battlefield and channel your inner colors with Jubilee, arriving with Season 9 of Marvel Rivals on July 10 UTC! 🎇

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

[Verse 1]
There I was again tonight
Forcing laughter, faking smiles
Same old tired, lonely place
Walls of insincerity
Shifting eyes and vacancy
Vanished when I saw your face
All I can say is it was enchanting to meet you

[Verse 2]
Your eyes whispered, "Have we met?"
Across the room, your silhouette
Starts to make its way to me
The playful conversation starts
Counter all your quick remarks
Like passing notes in secrecy
And it was enchanting to meet you
All I can say is I was enchanted to meet you

[Chorus]
This night is sparklin', don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck, blushin' all the way home
I'll spеnd forever wonderin' if you knеw
I was enchanted to meet you

[Verse 3]
The lingering question kept me up
2 a.m., who do you love?
I wonder 'til I'm wide awake
And now, I'm pacing back and forth
Wishing you were at my door
I'd open up and you would say
"Hey, it was enchanting to meet you"
All I know is I was enchanted to meet you

[Chorus]
This night is sparklin', don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck, blushin' all the way home
I'll spend forever wonderin' if you knew
This night is flawless, don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck, dancing around all alone
I'll spend forever wonderin' if you knew
I was enchanted to meet you

[Bridge]
This is me praying that
This was the very first page
Not where the storyline ends
My thoughts will echo your name
Until I see you again
These are the words I held back
As I was leaving too soon
I was enchanted to meet you
Please, don't be in love with someone else
Please, don't have somebody waitin' on you
Please, don't be in love with someone else (Ooh)
Please, don't have somebody waitin' on you (Oh-oh)

[Chorus]
This night is sparklin', don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck, blushin' all the way home
I'll spend forever wonderin' if you knew

Don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck (Please, don't have somebody waitin' on you)
Dancing around all alone
I'll spend forever (Please, don't be in love with someone else)
Wonderin' if you knew
I was enchanted to meet you

[Outro]
Please, don't be in love with someone else
Please, don't have somebody waitin' on you

從wiki維基百科來的Roblox介紹：
